description: Style Note Crafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this brassiere from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you a great look in your body-hugging outfits. Now that's something worth investing in! Product Details Black brassiere in stretchy fabric, has scalloped edges Adjustable, removable, elasticated shoulder straps Underwiring comes with a pair of transparent shoulder straps Material and Care 92% cotton, 8% spandex Hand wash, drip dry in shade Do not wring, iron, bleach Wash dark colours separately Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
